message:
Running command: # Perfect! Now I have all the pieces to write a manual grt_finish.tcl script.
# This will:
# 1. Source _env.tcl to get all variables
# 2. Read the CURRENT_ODB (step 29 ODB)
# 3. Load the GRT guide from after_grt.guide  
# 4. Run set_rc + estimate_parasitics
# 5. write_views (writes ODB, DEF, etc.)
# Without check_antennas

STEP32="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting"
SCRIPTS_DIR="/nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts"

# Also get the METRICS path
grep "METRICS\|or_metrics" "$STEP32/_env.tcl" | head -5
